extortion.description: nenplas.co.uk zoominfo.com/c/nenplas-ltd/1115375413 Nenplas is a leading UK manufacturer specializing in bespoke plastic extrusion products, offering a wide range of extruded and fabricated plastic profiles. With over 40 years of experience and more than 3,000 existing tools, they provide quick and efficient turnaround for various materials including PVC, ABS, and HDPE. Their services cater to diverse market sectors such as industrial, glazing systems, and furniture, ensuring high-quality design and development through in-house capabilities. Nenplas is committed to delivering reliable and innovative solutions to their national and international customer base
